last_result.summary: Discovery completed for the M0 factory wave. User decisions: MIT license; one pinned Linux x86-64 reference environment with no broader M0 compatibility claim; outside contributions closed during M0; GitHub Actions for functional, sanitizer, and advisory benchmark checks, with authoritative performance gates restricted to controlled-runner measurements. All foundational seed assumptions A-D04 through A-D08 are confirmed. No critical unknowns or deferred questions remain.

Foundation spec pack is complete and implementation-ready for domain specification work. Discovery precedence and all ten confirmed answers are mapped to decisions; the latest review's testability, glossary, trace-sequencing, risk-traceability, and readiness findings are resolved; SPECS.md contains the complete Foundation and M0-M11 roadmap plus the full domain template. One legal-notice value remains a non-blocking clarification and is governed by safe Assumption D-016, which blocks public packaging rather than inventing a holder or year.

open_questions.text: What exact copyright year and legal holder name must appear in the root MIT LICENSE and packaged copies?
open_questions.why_it_matters: The MIT license choice is accepted, but repository metadata is not authoritative legal identity data; public packages must contain a final owner-approved notice.
open_questions.unlocks: Completion of the public-packaging portion of the M0 governance and release gate.
options: Supply the exact legal holder name and copyright year for all root and packaged MIT notices.
Have the release owner obtain counsel-approved notice wording before public packaging.
open_questions.default: Do not infer or ship placeholder values; require owner-supplied holder and year in specs/11-governance-release.md and block public packaging until both are supplied.

last_result.summary: First-round foundation verification found 10 blocking findings: three Charter testability gaps, four Glossary completeness/consistency defects, two Risk traceability defects, and premature Ready declarations in SPECS.md. The ADR log is READY, all required foundation files exist, and no planned specs/10+ file was treated as missing.

open_questions.text: What exact copyright year and legal holder name should appear in the root MIT LICENSE and packaged copies?
open_questions.why_it_matters: The Charter requires the standard MIT text and packaged license validation, but the required notice value cannot be derived from discovery, the decisions, or the project seed.
open_questions.unlocks: Final root LICENSE content, packaged-license checks, and release evidence for G-03, SM-10, and DOD-06.
open_questions.default: Require an owner-supplied notice in the release domain specification and block public packaging; do not invent a holder or ship a placeholder.
